message:
feat: add DuckDB/Polars comparison to all benchmarks

- bench_logic_table.zig: compare @logic_table vs DuckDB/Polars for vector ops
- bench_vector_ops.zig: compare Metal GPU vs DuckDB/Polars cosine similarity
- bench_parquet.zig: compare parquet reading performance across engines
- build.zig: add bench-parquet build target

All benchmarks now show LanceQL performance alongside DuckDB and Polars
(via subprocess) for honest comparison. Note: subprocess overhead makes
DuckDB/Polars appear slower than in-process would be.
